mapper.select: SELECT * FROM rescue_report WHERE animal_id = #{animalId} ORDER BY reported_at DESC
SELECT * FROM rescue_report WHERE reporter_user_id = #{reporterUserId} ORDER BY reported_at DESC
SELECT * FROM rescue_report WHERE shelter_id = #{shelterId} ORDER BY reported_at DESC
SELECT * FROM rescue_report WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY reported_at DESC
SELECT * FROM rescue_report WHERE urgent_level = #{urgentLevel} ORDER BY reported_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rescue_report WHERE shelter_id = #{shelterId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rescue_report WHERE status = #{status}
mapper.update: UPDATE rescue_report SET status = #{status}, shelter_id = #{shelterId}, handled_at = NOW() WHERE report_id = #{reportId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM rescue_report WHERE status = 0 AND urgent_level >= 4 ORDER BY urgent_level DESC, reported_at ASC
SELECT * FROM rescue_report ORDER BY reported_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
